title: EVENTS – hololive（ホロライブ）公式サイト

items.title: Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-
items.author: narita
items.content:
hololive English Official Pop-Up Store “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-” To Be Held in New Jersey, USA!

hololive English Official Pop-Up Store “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-”

Monday, October 6th – Sunday, November 2nd, 2025 (EDT)*Store hours will be announced at a later date.

Details regarding exhibits, merchandise sales, and other event information will be announced at a later date via the official hololive English X account. Please follow us for the latest updates!
